case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BENNETT PRODUCTION C/O JOHN J BENNETT

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT PRODUCTION  C/O JOHN J BENNETT
